title: Trichouratea nana
taxonomy: Trichouratea nana is a member of the family Gesneriaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the African violet or gesneriad family. This family is part of the order Lamiales, a large and diverse group of flowering plants. The order Lamiales is further classified under the class Magnoliopsida, which includes all flowering plants with a four- or two-part flower. The class Magnoliopsida is part of the division Magnoliophyta, which is the plant division that includes all flowering plants. This division is also known as the angiosperms.
